title: DfT: special advisers’ gifts, hospitality and meetings, July to September 2024
body: "The Department for Transport (DfT) publishes quarterly details of special advisers’ meetings with senior media figures and any gifts or hospitality they received on a quarterly basis.  This data is also available on data.gov.uk:   DfT ministerial and special adviser hospitality on data.gov.uk DfT ministerial and special adviser gifts on data.gov.uk DfT ministerial and special adviser meetings on data.gov.uk  "
